sections.research_overview:
## 2. 研究概述


### 2.1 研究主題

> MindVLA-o1 is Li Auto's VLA foundation model unveiled at GTC 2025. Unifies spatial, linguistic and behavioral intelligence. Features MoE + Sparse Attention LLM backbone, native 3D ViT encoder, latent world model for "think before act", and diffusion decoding for trajectory generation. Claimed as step toward L4. No technical paper or benchmarks available.

### 2.2 研究領域分類

- [x] World Model (世界模型)
- [ ] Video Generation (影片生成)
- [x] 3D Scene Understanding (3D場景理解)
- [x] Motion Planning (運動規劃)
- [x] End-to-End Driving (端到端駕駛)
- [ ] Simulation (模擬器)
- [ ] Occupancy Prediction (佔用預測)
- [ ] Neural Rendering (神經渲染)

### 2.3 所使用的自動駕駛架構

- [ ] **Modular Pipeline** (模組化管線)
- [ ] **End-to-End** (端到端)
- [ ] **World Model + Planner** (世界模型 + 規劃器)
- [x] **Foundation Model** (基石模型)

---
